NOTICE OF APPEAL REC'D & RETURNED; DEFT WAS NOT PRESENT IN COURT. SCF #35 MAILED W/ MOVAC FORM.
CERT MAIL SENT TO ANY AUTHORIZED AGENT OF PROCESS LEGAL TAX DEFENDERS GROUP, INC RETURNED SIGNED

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-26-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JAN-30-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 MOTION FOR CHANGE OF VENUE DENIED. BASIS: CONTRACT ALLEGEDLY PROCURED BY FRAUD, INCLUDING ALLEGATION THAT VENUE PROVISION WAS WAIVED. REPRESENTATIONS MADE IN SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY.
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY THE DEFT, LEGAL TAX DEFENDERS GROUP, INC.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF APR-07-2003, DENIED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HIJAZI, MOHAMMED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGAL TAX DEFENDERS, GROUP, LLC $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,632.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
